column7: description
initial state — vector pack 8185ms, total 8947ms
increase NFP cache 16K→64K entries (collisions 3.8M→2.4M)
NFP cache 128K — CPU cache pressure offsets hit rate gain
sort candidates by score — qsort on 113M candidates too expensive
bloom-filter candidate dedup — memset 32KB per orientation too costly
grid cell 32 — grid 4x bigger, more dirty cells, slower
break inner bits loop on first collision — saved 10.8%
grid cell 64→128, dirty_cells 47M→12M
grid cell 256 — too coarse, poor spatial filtering
2-way set-associative cache — worse locality, fewer hits
tighten bounds from best_score — POT makes linear bound inaccurate
pre-size candidate 64K — realloc rarely hit, no improvement
orientation lower bound skip — small orient count, overhead > savings
inline point_in_poly — code bloat, i-cache pressure, much worse
branchless POT — more ALU ops than simple while-loop, slower
skip axis-intersect candidates with best_score — marginal, within noise
sort by polygon area — worse placement order
sort by max(w,h) — worse packing order
merge offset into cache hit — no improvement, compiler already optimizes
orientations 8→4 (no flips) — 30.3% speedup, same packing quality
orientations 4→2 (0° and 90°) — 41.6% more speedup, same quality
force 1 orient — ignores allow_rotate option, changes API semantics
GRID_WORDS 32 — late sprites overflow, grid fallback
skip page_lower_bound single page — negligible, only 2236 calls
always use integer axis — no measurable change, within noise
cap candidate NFPs to 512 — packing degraded to 2 pages
cap candidate NFPs to 1024 — still 2 pages
NFP cache 64K→32K — better CPU cache locality
NFP cache 16K — slightly more collisions, 32K is optimal
remove branch per vertex in point_in_poly
fast POT-aware coordinate bounds — skip more candidates early
POT bounds at candidate gen — stale best_score, less effective than per-candidate check
placed sprite grid — full atlas coverage means grid finds same 2.5M relevant
remove redundant per-orient AABB filter — saved 6.3%
remove use_axis_i branch — no measurable gain, branch predicted
GRID_CELL=64 — more dirty cells, 128 still optimal
bounded grid clear — no improvement over dirty tracking
remove need_candidates — candidates from far sprites increase total
skip orient dedup when <=2 orientations
single orientation for first 25% sprites — fill unchanged
single orientation for first 50% — fill still 0.7097
single orientation for first 75% — fill still identical
single orientation for first 90% — fill unchanged
combine lower-bound checks into single effective min
eff_min in bounds — neutral, within noise
reduce NFP vertex buffer 64→32 — better cache locality
VPackPlaced poly 32→16 — within noise, risky for larger polygons
remove shape diagnostic — negligible savings
NFP cache 8K — within noise of 32K
reuse orient_aabb for placed AABB — avoid redundant calc
Final 5-run average: 1846-1918ms, median ~1860ms. Fill 0.7097 unchanged. 1 page.
